current_commit_message: Slightly more careful logic in .tempfile method

Don't put nonsense in the CN field
Teach CA.issue_server_cert to handle IDN and ip addresses
Update DNSName calls in test suite for new cryptography
Try to add support for intermediate CAs
Use correct private key when building CA
Add Key Usage extensions, required for CAs
Add cRLSign to CAs KeyUsage as required by CAFB
Decrease path length when creating child CAs
Rename issue_server_cert -> issue_cert, and support email addresses
Add support for specifying common names
Make the issue_cert kwarg error tests clearer
Set cert expiration dates to avoid Y2038 problem
Add an example of the client cert auth
Use Trio's proxy ssl module instead of stdlib one
🎨 Use email for client cert in docs example
🎨 Reuse the same CA for client and server certs
Drop default backend in cryptography calls (#562)
Bump minimum versions to match reality (#561)
Implement ECDSA keys and use them by default (#563)
Also allow os.PathLike in typing of write_to_path (#606)
Remove redundant types from parameter docstrings (#607)
Drop Python 3.7, add PyPy 3.10 and CPython 3.12 (#609)
Allow setting of cert's notBefore attribute

Bump GitHub Actions, fix CI and coverage (#663)
